metaDescription: Curated Opportunity Radar feed for CFPs, conferences, publication calls, media opportunities, and field signals.

purposeSection.title: Start with what you are trying to do.

map.title: Where the in-person calls are gathering.
map.text: Mapped from recognizable event locations in the feed. Contact-name locations stay off the map until a venue can be inferred cleanly.
map.loadingText: Map data from OpenStreetMap via OpenFreeMap.
map.unavailableText: The mapped location list is still available to the right.

results.savedNote: Saved items stay only in this browser on this device.
results.savedGroupText: Your private browser-local shortlist, sorted by the current controls.
results.emptySavedText: No saved opportunities match these filters. Use Save on any card to build a private browser-local shortlist.
results.emptyNewText: No new opportunities match these filters. New items appear after the feed changes on a later visit.
results.emptyFilteredText: No matching opportunities right now. Try widening the search or changing the filters.

generatedInsights.matchedFallback: Matched because it comes from a monitored opportunity source.

sourceSection.title: How this list is gathered.
sourceSection.text: These sources help surface possibilities for the RCID community. They are starting points for review, not automatic endorsements.
sourceSection.feedText: The radar refreshes from a curated source list, then filters for readable deadlines, source confidence, deduplication, and likely RCID relevance. Some high-value sources are email-distributed newsletters, including NCA COMMNotes, and are tracked as watchlist sources until a dedicated inbox parser is connected. Some sites limit automated access, change their markup, or publish broad listings where only a few items fit the feed, so not every call from every monitored source appears here.
sourceSection.watchlistText: High-value sources we track for future automation or manual review.
